code: /** Azure Monitor supported-metrics documentation URLs. */const AZURE_METRICS_DOC_BASE='https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/azure-monitor/reference/supported-metrics';export function azureMetricsDocUrl(docRef){const ref=String(docRef||'').trim();if(!ref)return null;if(ref.startsWith('http://')||ref.startsWith('https://'))return ref;const slug=ref.endsWith('-metrics')?ref:"".concat(ref,"-metrics");return"".concat(AZURE_METRICS_DOC_BASE,"/").concat(slug);}
